prompt: Create one vertical smartphone-friendly scene illustration for a serial web novel. Do not render any readable text, chapter numbers, talk labels, section labels, captions, subtitles, logos, or UI overlays inside the image. Story context: 第3章　朝を持ち帰る / 第2話　汗が引くまで. Scene focus: 第1節　ベランダの深呼吸 / サトーパート. Summary: 部屋へ戻ると、まず静けさがありがたかった。シューズを脱ぎ、ボトルの残りを飲みきり、窓を大きく開ける。外から入る風は河川敷より少しぬるく、部屋の空気と混ざるとちょうどいい温度にな… Key beats: 部屋へ戻ると、まず静けさがありがたかった。シューズを脱ぎ、ボトルの残りを飲みきり、窓を大きく開ける。外から入る風は河川敷より少しぬるく、部屋の空気と混ざるとちょうどいい温度になった。サトーはタオルで首筋を拭い、ベランダへ出て肩と脚をゆっくり伸ばす。 走り終わったあとのストレッチは、走っている最中よりいくらか素直だ。呼吸を急がせる必要がなく、筋肉がどこまで伸びるかをただ確かめればいい。マンションの向こうには、さっきまで走っていた白鷺川の橋が小さく見えた。遠くから見ると、あの景色もいつもの街並みにすぎない。それでも今朝の自分にとっては、ずいぶんいい場所だった。 風に当たっているうちに、肌の熱が少しずつ引いていく。汗ばんだ長袖トップスが不快になる前の、この短い時間も嫌いではない。走った事実がまだ身体に残っていて、それでいてもう一日の支度に切り替えられる。朝に運動する理由の半分くらいは、この切り替わり方にあるのかもしれなかった。 ベランダの手すりへ片手を置き、サトーはゆっくりと息を吐く。街はもう普通の平日へ動き始めている。その一歩手前で、自分だけ先にひと仕事終えたような感覚があった。 Use the supplied character reference images to preserve these canonical looks: sato-jogging: サトー. Keep him as a mature 45-year-old Japanese man with long hair tied in a ponytail, mustache and chin beard, and a lean athletic build. In this novel he must always wear cool-weather jogging clothes, never denim or businesswear. sera-jogging: セラ. Keep her in a maid-inspired running outfit rather than an indoor maid dress, with silver-gray hair, golden eyes, black-and-white technical fabrics, and a clearly visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. Do not turn the outfit into armor or a generic tracksuit. Focus characters: sato-jogging. Keep them clearly readable in the foreground or midground. Continuity notes: This is the Sato-part of the same balcony-cooldown incident as scene-003-002-001-sera. Keep the same apartment balcony or open window, same post-run light, and same home setting in both images. In every scene of this novel, Sato must keep his canonical face, long ponytail, mustache, chin beard, and lean 45-year-old build, while wearing early-April jogging wear suited to a cool Tokyo morning: a light running jacket or windbreaker, technical long-sleeve top, tapered running pants, and running shoes. In every scene of this novel, Sera must keep her canonical face, silver-gray hair, golden eyes, and cat ears while wearing a cute maid-inspired jogging outfit built from black-and-white performance fabrics, with apron-line design cues, a short pleated running skirt over leggings, a light jacket, running shoes, and a visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. For Sato-part images, Sato must be the dominant subject and Sera, if visible, must stay clearly separated from him by distance, never adjacent, never shoulder-to-shoulder, and never readable as a companion; she may be visible in the distance or on another part of the path, but not as an extremely tiny speck. For Sera-part images, Sera must be the dominant subject, actively stopping a separate attacker who clearly does not resemble Sato. In every Sera-part image, Sato must remain an unaware background figure, non-combatant, not helping, facing away from the action or looking elsewhere, and not looking toward Sera, the attacker, or the incident. Never let any attacker resemble Sato in face, hair, beard, age, clothing, build, or silhouette. All human figures must have normal anatomy with exactly two arms and two hands.  Compose a calm post-run cooldown image with Sato dominant on a balcony or by an open window, stretching lightly and letting the spring breeze pull the sweat away. If Sera appears, place her clearly apart from Sato on a distant rooftop or shadowed exterior line, distant but readable, never companion-like.
